meta.name: Nepal Skincare App — Feature Roadmap Database
meta.description: Product feature ideas with descriptions, user benefits, priority, status, and impact estimates.

features.name: Glow Score Dashboard
features.description: A weekly 0-100 score calculated from user logs (water intake, sleep, sunscreen use, diet). Displayed with an inspiring glowing skin visual that updates based on score tier.
features.user_benefit: Gamification increases daily active users by ~30% based on similar health apps
features.visual_component: Radiant skin image scales from dull to glowing as score improves

features.name: Seasonal Skin Alerts
features.description: Push notifications tied to Kathmandu AQI, UV index, and humidity levels fetched daily. "AQI is 180 today — double cleanse tonight and use a barrier serum"
features.user_benefit: Hyper-local relevance — no other app does this for Nepal
features.data_source: Nepal EPA air quality API + OpenWeatherMap

features.name: Nepali Festival Skin Prep Calendar
features.description: In-app calendar showing upcoming festivals (Dashain, Tihar, Holi, Teej) with automated 2-week skin prep guides starting 14 days before each event.
features.user_benefit: Viral potential — shareable festival-specific skin content

features.name: Ingredient Scanner (Barcode)
features.description: Scan any skincare product barcode sold in Nepal — app shows ingredient safety rating, comedogenicity, and fit with user's specific skin condition.
features.user_benefit: Massive trust builder. Unique to market.

features.name: Community Before & After Wall
features.description: Moderated user-submitted 30/60/90 day skin transformation photos. Users can upvote and comment. Blurred until user opts in for visibility.
features.user_benefit: Social proof + user-generated content reduces content creation cost

features.name: Dermatologist Verified Badge
features.description: Partner with 3-5 Nepali/Nepal-based dermatologists to review and badge articles and product recommendations. Show doctor name + credentials.
features.user_benefit: Trust differentiation from generic beauty apps

features.name: Nepali Language Full Mode
features.description: Complete UI in Nepali (Devanagari) with voice-over for quiz questions. Target users outside Kathmandu with lower English literacy.
features.user_benefit: Opens Terai and rural market — potentially 3x addressable market

features.name: Photo Log + AI Progress Analysis
features.description: Monthly selfie log with consistent lighting guide. AI compares photos over time and highlights improvements in tone evenness, texture, and redness reduction.
features.user_benefit: Core retention feature — users who log photos 3x are 5x more likely to stay 90 days
